_comment: Curated, approximate heuristic for classifying an Azure subscription's environment (production / staging / test / development) from its display name and/or an 'environment'-style tag. Azure has no built-in environment taxonomy; this matches the common enterprise convention of one subscription per environment. A subscription whose display name (or tag) matches none of these patterns is classified 'unknown' and is never treated as different from another 'unknown' - this can under-report cross-environment connectivity, it will never fabricate a mismatch on a guess. Patterns are matched as case-insensitive substrings against the display name and against the values of any of tag_keys_checked.
